title: Luffy Refuses to Let Krieg Break the Baratie
description: On pages 1–4, the fight against Krieg reaches a moral breaking point as Gin, Sanji, Zeff, and Luffy clash over debt, survival, and strength.
scene: Krieg’s weapons and cruelty force everyone at the Baratie to reveal what they truly value: victory, loyalty, survival, or protecting someone else’s dream.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Sanji, I wanted you to leave this ship without hurting you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But it seems things can't be that way.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: No, they can't.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So then the least I could do is kill you myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's the solution I've arrived at.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: ...Ha. Why, thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Now kindly eat shit and die.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You too, Strawhat.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It would've been best for you to leave with your crewmates earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Nah, it's not as if I could ever be beaten by weaklings like you.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: T-They just called us weaklings and told our Commander off!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: We're the Krieg pirates, the strongest pirate crew in all of East Blue!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Weren't you guys just the biggest pirate crew?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right on the target, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Guess I was right.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You idiot! Don't provoke them any more!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You're still up against Don Krieg!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: His strength's the real thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That Dimwit...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's kill them our- selves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Step back, all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: D-Don Krieg...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But they...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: A person who gets angry just for being called weak,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Is indirectly admitting that he's weak.

summary: This part pushes the Baratie battle toward its climax by contrasting Krieg’s ruthless power with Luffy and Sanji’s stubborn ideals.
